productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Navy Flats
description: Look adorable in this pair of classic, Greek-inspired sandals from carlton london. The woven and braided straps on the toe region and adjustable ankle buckle offers a comfortable Fit and a contemporary glamourous look. Slip into them with a flowy dress and a shoulder bag, and enjoy those shopping sprees in the winter sun in comfort and style.UpperSynthetic leather toe region woven and braided strap with an ankle buckle strap to customise fit and lock the foot in placeSoft footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleLightweight durable PU outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and a rubber heel unit with horizontal grooves for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
